sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّاسُ قَدِيمًا يَصْنَعُونَ الْخُبْزَ فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su nekada pravili hljeb kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: People in the old days used to make bread at home.

sentences.arabic: كَانُوا يَطْحَنُونَ الْقَمْحَ وَيُضِيفُونَ الْمَاءَ إِلَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: Mljeli su pšenicu i dodavali joj vodu.
sentences.translationEn: They used to grind wheat and add water to it.

sentences.translation: Zatim su ga pekli na vatri.
sentences.translationEn: Then they would bake it over a fire.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْخُبْزُ الطَّازَجُ يَفُوحُ مِنْهُ رَائِحَةٌ طَيِّبَةٌ.
sentences.translationEn: The fresh bread had a wonderful aroma.
